question: The receptionist greeted every visitor _____.
explanation: 动词 / 形容词 + 副词。副词用于说明动作如何发生，或修饰形容词。 本题正确答案是 “courteously”。

question: The revised software operates much more _____ than the previous version.
explanation: 动词 / 形容词 + 副词。副词用于说明动作如何发生，或修饰形容词。 本题正确答案是 “efficiently”。

question: Please read the warranty terms _____ before signing the form.
explanation: 动词 / 形容词 + 副词。副词用于说明动作如何发生，或修饰形容词。 本题正确答案是 “carefully”。

question: Ms. Patel's _____ of the budget helped the team reduce costs.
explanation: 冠词 / 所有格 + 名词。冠词 a、an、the 或所有格后通常接名词。 本题正确答案是 “review”。

question: The committee reached a _____ after reviewing all proposals.
explanation: 冠词 / 所有格 + 名词。冠词 a、an、the 或所有格后通常接名词。 本题正确答案是 “decision”。

question: Our _____ of the new branch will begin next week.
explanation: 冠词 / 所有格 + 名词。冠词 a、an、the 或所有格后通常接名词。 本题正确答案是 “inspection”。

question: The updated employee handbook is now _____ online.
explanation: be / seem / become + 形容词。连系动词后常用形容词说明主语的状态或特征。 本题正确答案是 “available”。

question: Customers were _____ with the speed of the repair service.
explanation: be / seem / become + 形容词。连系动词后常用形容词说明主语的状态或特征。 本题正确答案是 “satisfied”。

question: The instructions for submitting expenses are _____ and easy to follow.
explanation: be / seem / become + 形容词。连系动词后常用形容词说明主语的状态或特征。 本题正确答案是 “clear”。

question: The annual awards ceremony will be held _____ November 18.
explanation: at + 时间点；on + 日期；in + 月份/年份。具体时间点常用 at，日期或星期常用 on，月份、年份或较长期间常用 in。 本题正确答案是 “on”。

question: The accounting department closes _____ 6:00 P.M. on Fridays.
explanation: at + 时间点；on + 日期；in + 月份/年份。具体时间点常用 at，日期或星期常用 on，月份、年份或较长期间常用 in。 本题正确答案是 “at”。

question: Construction of the new warehouse began _____ 2025.
explanation: at + 时间点；on + 日期；in + 月份/年份。具体时间点常用 at，日期或星期常用 on，月份、年份或较长期间常用 in。 本题正确答案是 “in”。

question: The auditorium has been reserved _____ the product launch.
explanation: for + 名词。for 后接名词时，可以表示目的、用途或对象。 本题正确答案是 “for”。

question: This discount is available _____ first-time customers.
explanation: for + 名词。for 后接名词时，可以表示目的、用途或对象。 本题正确答案是 “for”。

question: The attached guide provides instructions _____ new employees.
explanation: for + 名词。for 后接名词时，可以表示目的、用途或对象。 本题正确答案是 “for”。

question: _____ the office was closed, the support team answered calls remotely.
explanation: although + S + V。although 后接完整句子，表示“虽然”；despite 后接名词。 本题正确答案是 “Although”。

question: _____ demand was lower than expected, the company met its sales target.
explanation: although + S + V。although 后接完整句子，表示“虽然”；despite 后接名词。 本题正确答案是 “Although”。

question: _____ the printer is inexpensive, it produces high-quality images.
explanation: although + S + V。although 后接完整句子，表示“虽然”；despite 后接名词。 本题正确答案是 “Although”。

question: The delivery was delayed _____ a highway had been closed.
explanation: because + S + V；because of + 名词。because 后接完整句子说明原因；because of 后接名词或名词短语。 本题正确答案是 “because”。

question: We extended the registration period _____ many employees requested more time.
explanation: because + S + V；because of + 名词。because 后接完整句子说明原因；because of 后接名词或名词短语。 本题正确答案是 “because”。

question: The meeting room was changed _____ the original room was too small.
explanation: because + S + V；because of + 名词。because 后接完整句子说明原因；because of 后接名词或名词短语。 本题正确答案是 “because”。

question: We will issue a receipt after the payment _____.
explanation: when / before / after / as soon as + 现在式。谈论未来时，时间副词子句通常用现在式代替 will。 本题正确答案是 “arrives”。

question: Before Ms. Lopez _____ the contract, she will consult the legal team.
explanation: when / before / after / as soon as + 现在式。谈论未来时，时间副词子句通常用现在式代替 will。 本题正确答案是 “signs”。

question: The technicians will begin work as soon as the replacement part _____.
explanation: when / before / after / as soon as + 现在式。谈论未来时，时间副词子句通常用现在式代替 will。 本题正确答案是 “arrives”。

question: The schedule of training sessions _____ posted near the elevator.
explanation: 单数主语 + 单数动词。主语中心词为单数时，动词使用单数形式；介词短语不改变主语单复数。 本题正确答案是 “is”。

question: A collection of customer comments _____ included in the report.
explanation: 单数主语 + 单数动词。主语中心词为单数时，动词使用单数形式；介词短语不改变主语单复数。 本题正确答案是 “is”。

question: The quality of these materials _____ our high standards.
explanation: 单数主语 + 单数动词。主语中心词为单数时，动词使用单数形式；介词短语不改变主语单复数。 本题正确答案是 “meets”。

question: Each of the applicants _____ two professional references.
explanation: each / every + 单数动词。each、every、everyone 等表达在语法上通常视为单数。 本题正确答案是 “provides”。

question: Every conference room _____ a video display.
explanation: each / every + 单数动词。each、every、everyone 等表达在语法上通常视为单数。 本题正确答案是 “has”。

question: Each employee _____ responsible for updating the contact list.
explanation: each / every + 单数动词。each、every、everyone 等表达在语法上通常视为单数。 本题正确答案是 “is”。

question: Applicants _____ have relevant experience will be contacted first.
explanation: 人 + who + V。先行词是人，且空格在关系子句中作主语时，使用 who。 本题正确答案是 “who”。

question: The consultant _____ prepared the report will present it tomorrow.
explanation: 人 + who + V。先行词是人，且空格在关系子句中作主语时，使用 who。 本题正确答案是 “who”。

question: Customers _____ subscribe this month will receive a discount.
explanation: 人 + who + V。先行词是人，且空格在关系子句中作主语时，使用 who。 本题正确答案是 “who”。

question: Employees _____ badges have expired should visit the security desk.
explanation: whose + 名词。whose 后接名词，表示该名词属于前面提到的人或事物。 本题正确答案是 “whose”。

question: The supplier _____ products passed inspection received a new contract.
explanation: whose + 名词。whose 后接名词，表示该名词属于前面提到的人或事物。 本题正确答案是 “whose”。

question: We thanked the volunteers _____ efforts made the event successful.
explanation: whose + 名词。whose 后接名词，表示该名词属于前面提到的人或事物。 本题正确答案是 “whose”。

question: Ms. Hall is responsible _____ preparing the weekly sales report.
explanation: be responsible for + 名词 / V-ing。be responsible for 表示“负责……”，for 后接名词或 V-ing。 本题正确答案是 “for”。

question: The maintenance team is responsible for _____ the elevators.
explanation: be responsible for + 名词 / V-ing。be responsible for 表示“负责……”，for 后接名词或 V-ing。 本题正确答案是 “inspecting”。

question: Who is responsible _____ approving travel requests?
explanation: be responsible for + 名词 / V-ing。be responsible for 表示“负责……”，for 后接名词或 V-ing。 本题正确答案是 “for”。

question: Please notify the hotel at least 24 hours in _____.
explanation: in advance。in advance 表示“提前”。 本题正确答案是 “advance”。

question: Meeting materials will be distributed in _____ so participants can prepare.
explanation: in advance。in advance 表示“提前”。 本题正确答案是 “advance”。

question: Employees should request vacation time well in _____.
explanation: in advance。in advance 表示“提前”。 本题正确答案是 “advance”。

question: The human resources department will _____ qualified candidates next week.
explanation: 商务场景 + 合适词义。根据采购、会议、人事、运输等商务场景，选择最符合上下文的词。 本题正确答案是 “interview”。

question: Please attach all original _____ when submitting an expense report.
explanation: 商务场景 + 合适词义。根据采购、会议、人事、运输等商务场景，选择最符合上下文的词。 本题正确答案是 “receipts”。

question: The supplier offered a ten percent _____ for orders over 500 units.
explanation: 商务场景 + 合适词义。根据采购、会议、人事、运输等商务场景，选择最符合上下文的词。 本题正确答案是 “discount”。

question: The research team is dedicated to _____ safer packaging materials.
explanation: be dedicated to + V-ing。to 是前置词，后面接 V-ing。 本题正确答案是 “developing”。

question: Our staff members are dedicated to _____ every customer promptly.
explanation: be dedicated to + V-ing。to 是前置词，后面接 V-ing。 本题正确答案是 “assisting”。

question: The organization is dedicated to _____ waste in its offices.
explanation: be dedicated to + V-ing。to 是前置词，后面接 V-ing。 本题正确答案是 “reducing”。

question: The directors have yet to _____ the revised budget.
explanation: have / has yet to + 原形动词。表示尚未做某事。 本题正确答案是 “approve”。

question: Ms. Green has yet to _____ her travel schedule.
explanation: have / has yet to + 原形动词。表示尚未做某事。 本题正确答案是 “confirm”。

question: The supplier has yet to _____ our request for a price estimate.
explanation: have / has yet to + 原形动词。表示尚未做某事。 本题正确答案是 “answer”。

question: The sales director, along with two assistants, _____ visiting the branch today.
explanation: A along with B + 与 A 一致的动词。主谓一致看 A，along with B 不改变主语的单复数。 本题正确答案是 “is”。

question: The new printer, along with several ink cartridges, _____ tomorrow.
explanation: A along with B + 与 A 一致的动词。主谓一致看 A，along with B 不改变主语的单复数。 本题正确答案是 “arrives”。

question: Ms. Evans, along with her colleagues, _____ prepared a proposal.
explanation: A along with B + 与 A 一致的动词。主谓一致看 A，along with B 不改变主语的单复数。 本题正确答案是 “has”。

question: All equipment must be inspected prior to _____ shipped.
explanation: prior to + 名词 / V-ing。prior to 是前置词，后面接名词或 V-ing。 本题正确答案是 “being”。

question: Visitors must obtain a badge prior to _____ the laboratory.
explanation: prior to + 名词 / V-ing。prior to 是前置词，后面接名词或 V-ing。 本题正确答案是 “entering”。

question: The final schedule will be shared prior to the _____.
explanation: prior to + 名词 / V-ing。prior to 是前置词，后面接名词或 V-ing。 本题正确答案是 “meeting”。

question: The downtown store opens at 8:00, _____ the airport location opens at 6:00.
explanation: whereas + S + V。whereas 是连接词，连接两个完整句子，表示对比。 本题正确答案是 “whereas”。

question: Paper applications take several days to process, _____ online forms are reviewed immediately.
explanation: whereas + S + V。whereas 是连接词，连接两个完整句子，表示对比。 本题正确答案是 “whereas”。

question: The basic plan covers repairs, _____ the premium plan includes replacement service.
explanation: whereas + S + V。whereas 是连接词，连接两个完整句子，表示对比。 本题正确答案是 “whereas”。

question: _____ submits the lowest qualified bid will receive the contract.
explanation: whoever + V。whoever 等于 anyone who，可引导主语从句。 本题正确答案是 “Whoever”。

question: _____ is assigned to the front desk should greet all visitors.
explanation: whoever + V。whoever 等于 anyone who，可引导主语从句。 本题正确答案是 “Whoever”。

question: _____ completes the survey will receive a confirmation email.
explanation: whoever + V。whoever 等于 anyone who，可引导主语从句。 本题正确答案是 “Whoever”。
